name: Dr. Jane Smith
bio: Jane leads the electron microscopy research group at King's College London. Her research focuses on characterising surface defects in engineering alloys using advanced SEM and TEM techniques.

name: Dr. John Doe
bio: John specialises in surface defect analysis and automated image classification. He developed the machine learning pipeline used in our defect detection workflow.

name: Dr. Ravi Patel
bio: Ravi works on EDS and EBSD analysis of engineering materials, with a particular interest in grain boundary characterisation and inclusion typing.

name: Dr. Lin Chen
bio: Lin's research examines fatigue crack initiation in nickel-based superalloys for aerospace applications, combining TEM and EBSD to understand microstructural drivers of crack formation.

name: Maria Garcia
bio: Maria is investigating the use of electron microscopy for quality control of additively manufactured metal components, focusing on lack-of-fusion and keyhole porosity defects.
